privileged_info_summary: The task requires starring exactly three priority email conversations in a 'Network Support' mailbox: (1) 'Core Switch Failure - Building A' - a critical network outage affecting 200 users in Building A MDF, (2) 'VPN Gateway Timeout Errors' - affecting 85 remote workers due to SSL handshake failures, and (3) 'DNS Resolution Failures Across Campus' - campus-wide DNS failures affecting 40% of queries. The task environment includes five additional routine conversation distractors (printer connectivity, workstation setup, WiFi performance, VoIP password reset, monitor replacement) that should not be starred. All data is synthetically generated for testing purposes.
